groups.title: Output
groups.description: Output mode, source priority, and AC output targets.

groups.title: Equalization
groups.description: Battery equalization voltage and timing controls.

groups.title: System
groups.description: Behavior toggles and maintenance actions proven on asset 0925.

capabilities.title: Output Priority
capabilities.change_summary: Changes how the inverter prioritizes utility, solar, and battery for the load.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Output priority` to register 4537.

capabilities.title: Input Voltage Range
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the acceptable AC input voltage range.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Input Voltage Range` to register 4538.

capabilities.title: Output Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the nominal AC output voltage target.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Output Voltage` to register 4542.

capabilities.title: Output Frequency
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the nominal AC output frequency target.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Output Frequency` to register 4540.

capabilities.title: Charger Source Priority
capabilities.change_summary: Changes which sources are allowed to charge the battery.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Charger Source Priority` to register 4536.

choices.label: PV Is At The Same Level As Utility

capabilities.title: Max Charging Current
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the total battery charging current limit.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Max.Charging Current` to register 4541. The cloud payload does not expose min/max bounds.

capabilities.title: Max AC Charging Current
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the utility-side charging current limit.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Max.AC.Charging Current` to register 4543. The cloud payload does not expose min/max bounds.

capabilities.title: Battery Type
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery chemistry profile.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Battery Type` to register 4539.

capabilities.title: Recovery Voltage Back To Mains Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the voltage threshold used when returning to mains mode.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Recovery Voltage Back To Mains Mode` to register 4544.

capabilities.title: Battery Return Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the threshold for returning from utility to battery operation.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `SOC recovery value of battery discharge in mains mode` to register 4545. The cloud label suggests some models expose this as SOC while local register 4545 is voltage-based.

capabilities.title: Bulk Charging Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the constant-voltage charging threshold.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Bulk Charging Voltage (C.V Voltage)` to register 4546.

capabilities.title: Floating Charging Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the float charging voltage.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Floating Charging Voltage` to register 4547.

capabilities.title: Low DC Protection Voltage In Mains Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the low-DC protection threshold.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `Low DC Protection Voltage In Mains Mode` to register 4548. Off-grid and SOC-based protection controls remain unresolved in the local schema.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables battery equalization mode.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Battery Equalization` at register 5011.

capabilities.title: EQ Charging Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the equalization charging voltage.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `EQ Charing Voltage` to register 4549.

capabilities.title: EQ Charging Time
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the equalization charge duration.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `EQ Charing Time` to register 4550.

capabilities.title: EQ Timeout Exit Time
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the timeout after which equalization exits automatically.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `EQ Timeout Exit time` to register 4551.

capabilities.title: EQ Interval Time
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the interval between equalization cycles.
capabilities.note: Mapped from SmartESS cloud field `EQ Interval Time` to register 4552.

capabilities.title: Forced EQ Charging
capabilities.change_summary: Requests one immediate battery equalization cycle.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Battery Equalization activated immediately` at register 5012.

capabilities.title: Clear Power History
capabilities.change_summary: Clears accumulated power history counters stored by the inverter.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Remove all power history` at register 5001.

capabilities.title: Buzzer Alarm
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the buzzer alarm.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Buzzer alarm` at register 5002.

capabilities.title: Power Saving Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the inverter power-saving mode.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Power saving mode` at register 5003.

capabilities.title: LCD Backlight
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the LCD backlight.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `LCD backlight` at register 5004.

capabilities.title: Overload Auto Restart
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables automatic restart after overload.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Overload auto restart` at register 5005.

capabilities.title: Over Temperature Auto Restart
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables automatic restart after over-temperature faults.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Over temperature auto restart` at register 5006.

capabilities.title: Primary Source Interrupt Alarm
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the primary-source interrupt alarm.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Beeps while primary source interupt` at register 5007.

capabilities.title: LCD Auto Return
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables auto-return to the default LCD screen.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Auto return to default display screen` at register 5008.

capabilities.title: Overload Bypass
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables automatic bypass during overload.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Transfer to bypass @ overload` at register 5009.

capabilities.title: Record Fault Code
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables recording fault codes in the inverter history.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Record fault code` at register 5010.

capabilities.title: Restore Defaults
capabilities.change_summary: Restores the inverter user settings to factory defaults.
capabilities.note: Mapped from the SmartESS 0925 root-map entry `Restore Defaults` at register 5016.
